children.name: a Data Analyst passionate about turning raw data into clear, actionable insights through analysis and visualization.
children.characters: a Data Analyst passionate about turning raw data into clear, actionable insights through analysis and visualization.

children.name: I am a Data Analyst passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful and actionable insights. I specialize in data cleaning, analysis, and visualization, with a strong focus on identifying trends, evaluating performance, and solving complex business problems. I’m continuously learning and exploring datasets to improve my skills.
children.characters:

I specialize in data cleaning, analysis, and visualization, with a strong focus on identifying trends, evaluating performance, and solving complex business problems. I’m continuously learning and exploring datasets to improve my skills.

children.name: This project analyzes LEGO dataset to uncover trends in themes, sets, and releases over time. The goal is to explore how LEGO products evolved and identify patterns in themes, complexity, and production growth.
children.characters: This project analyzes LEGO dataset to uncover trends in themes, sets, and releases over time. The goal is to explore how LEGO products evolved and identify patterns in themes, complexity, and production growth.

children.name: In this project, I performed a comprehensive market analysis of Airbnb listings in a major metropolitan area (Seattle). Using Tableau, I visualized the relationship between property size, geographic location, and seasonal revenue fluctuations. The goal was to provide potential real estate investors with a data-driven overview of which zip codes command the highest premiums and how bedroom count impacts the average daily rate.
children.characters: In this project, I performed a comprehensive market analysis of Airbnb listings in a major metropolitan area (Seattle). Using Tableau, I visualized the relationship between property size, geographic location, and seasonal revenue fluctuations. The goal was to provide potential real estate investors with a data-driven overview of which zip codes command the highest premiums and how bedroom count impacts the average daily rate.

children.name: This project involved developing a series of relational database queries to analyze a restaurant's operational performance. Using MySQL, I explored two primary datasets—menu items and order details—to uncover trends in customer preferences, revenue drivers, and order volume. By joining disparate tables and applying complex aggregations, I provided insights into menu optimization and high-value customer behavior.
children.characters: This project involved developing a series of relational database queries to analyze a restaurant's operational performance. Using MySQL, I explored two primary datasets—menu items and order details—to uncover trends in customer preferences, revenue drivers, and order volume. By joining disparate tables and applying complex aggregations, I provided insights into menu optimization and high-value customer behavior.

children.name: This project involved analyzing a dataset of bike customers to identify key purchasing patterns and demographic trends. By cleaning raw data and building an interactive dashboard, I transformed disparate data points into actionable insights regarding income levels, commute habits, and age brackets. The goal was to provide a retail stakeholder with a clear profile of their highest-converting customers to help optimize marketing spend.

children.name: This project analyzes LEGO dataset to uncover trends in themes, sets, and releases over time. The goal is to explore how LEGO products evolved and identify patterns in themes, complexity, and production growth.
children.characters: This project analyzes LEGO dataset to uncover trends in themes, sets, and releases over time. The goal is to explore how LEGO products evolved and identify patterns in themes, complexity, and production growth.

children.name: A significant increase in LEGO set releases over time, indicating strong business expansion. A small number of themes account for the majority of total releases. The average number of parts per set has steadily increased, reflecting growing product complexity.
children.characters:
A significant increase in LEGO set releases over time, indicating strong business expansion.
A small number of themes account for the majority of total releases.
The average number of parts per set has steadily increased, reflecting growing product complexity.

children.name: This project focuses on creating a user-centric discovery tool for LEGO enthusiasts and collectors. Using a dataset of LEGO sets, a high-fidelity Power BI report that allows users to drill down into specific themes and age ranges while monitoring key performance indicators (KPIs) like average piece count and price-to-part ratios. The dashboard prioritizes clean aesthetics and intuitive navigation, bridging the gap between complex data and a consumer-friendly interface.
children.characters: This project focuses on creating a user-centric discovery tool for LEGO enthusiasts and collectors. Using a dataset of LEGO sets,  a high-fidelity Power BI report that allows users to drill down into specific themes and age ranges while monitoring key performance indicators (KPIs) like average piece count and price-to-part ratios. The dashboard prioritizes clean aesthetics and intuitive navigation, bridging the gap between complex data and a consumer-friendly interface.

children.name: Coffee is the top revenue-generating category. Sales peak at 10 AM, reflecting strong morning demand. Revenue steadily increased from January to mid-year. Store locations show noticeable performance differences.
children.characters:
Coffee is the top revenue-generating category.
Sales peak at 10 AM, reflecting strong morning demand.
Revenue steadily increased from January to mid-year.
Store locations show noticeable performance differences.

children.name: Identified top- and low-performing menu items. High-value orders included multi-category purchases. Certain categories consistently drove higher revenue. Premium items significantly influenced total sales.

children.name: A stark supply gap between 1-bedroom and 6-bedroom units presents a high-ROI opportunity with minimal competition. Pricing scales sharply with size, as large-group accommodations command a premium due to limited supply. Annual revenue peaked at $2,000K by year-end, signaling a clear need for dynamic seasonal pricing strategies.
children.characters:
A stark supply gap between 1-bedroom and 6-bedroom units presents a high-ROI opportunity with minimal competition.

Pricing scales sharply with size, as large-group accommodations command a premium due to limited supply.

Annual revenue peaked at $2,000K by year-end, signaling a clear need for dynamic seasonal pricing strategies.
